title: Review fixes (hardening): partial-install guard, anchored version reader, dir/file transition ordering, repo-in-target refusal, case-alias fail-closed
action: Fix review P1 clusters 1-5 (docs/history/skill-sync/reports/review.md - read the evidence lines first), RED-FIRST: for each fix write the failing test against current code, capture the failure, then fix. (1) Partial install: installed_skills is 'absent' ONLY when the target holds NO lstat-visible bee-* entry at all; any bee-* present without a readable bee-hive version marker = unknown = refuse, never forceable. (2) Version reader: the preflight reader accepts exactly ONE line-anchored match of the exported declaration (^export const BEE_VERSION = 'x.y.z') read from a REGULAR, non-symlinked file (lstat every path component inside the managed target before trusting; source side lstat the marker file itself); comments/decoys/multiple matches/symlinked markers = unknown. (3) Dir<->file transitions: rework applySyncSkill ordering so stale-entry cleanup can never delete freshly materialized content - remove stale and opposite-type target entries (deepest-first) BEFORE writing the source shape, or stage the complete skill in a random sibling dir and atomically rename into place; test BOTH transition directions (installed dir -> source file, installed file -> source dir) incl. nested paths. (4) Repo-in-target: preflight also refuses (blocked_no_source, never forceable) when realpath(repoRoot) and the target root overlap in either direction - a repo living under ~/.claude/skills must never be deletable by its own onboard. (5) Case-insensitive filesystems: detect name aliasing between source and target bee-* entries (and nested paths) by canonical filesystem identity; on a collision (two names resolving to one physical entry) mark that skill blocked (loud report), never sync-then-delete; add a test that simulates the alias on the running platform (create bee-hive, probe whether bee-Hive resolves; skip with a named reason if the fs is case-sensitive).

truths: Each of the 5 fixes has a red-first test: the new test provably failed against pre-fix code (failure output recorded in evidence)
A target with bee-* skills but no bee-hive refuses as unknown (not fresh)
A decoy BEE_VERSION comment above the real declaration yields the real version or unknown - never the decoy
Both dir<->file transition directions converge to source shape with full manifest parity
repoRoot inside targetRoot (and reverse) refuses pre-write with zero mutations
Full suite green (existing 200 + new cases), test_lib 124 green
prohibitions: No assertion weakened or deleted (frozen judge - [BLOCKED] quoting any that seems wrong)
No changes outside the two declared files

trace.outcome: Hardened skill-sync stage against review P1 clusters 1-5: partial installs (bee-* without readable bee-hive) resolve unknown and refuse unforceably; version reader accepts exactly one line-anchored 'export const BEE_VERSION' from a regular non-symlinked file with every target path component lstat'ed; applySyncSkill removes stale/opposite-type entries deepest-first BEFORE materializing (both dir<->file directions converge incl. nested); repoRoot<->targetRoot overlap refuses blocked_no_source pre-write; case-insensitive name aliases detected by canonical dev:ino identity and fail closed (blocked_alias, plan+apply). 32 new red-first checks; suite 232 green (+7 alias checks green on a case-insensitive mount), test_lib 124 green.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs (full suite read: sections 1-10p, 200 checks, per-case fake-HOME isolation, hashTree zero-mutation pattern)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "test_onboard_bee.mjs 10q partial install = unknown, never fresh (7 checks)",
    "test_onboard_bee.mjs 10r version reader: decoy comment / multiple declarations / symlinked marker / symlinked path component (8 checks)",
    "test_onboard_bee.mjs 10s dir<->file transitions both directions incl. nested (10 checks)",
    "test_onboard_bee.mjs 10t repoRoot<->targetRoot overlap both directions (7 checks)",
    "test_onboard_bee.mjs 10u case-alias fail-closed, platform-probed, BEE_CASE_FS_DIR override for case-insensitive mounts (7 checks, named skip on case-sensitive fs)"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "All 5 fixes red-first against pre-fix code (commit e6c5d72 state). Run 1 (default /tmp): 24 FAILs. P1-1: 'partial install (bee-* without bee-hive) refuses as unknown, never fresh :: exit 0 status changes_needed' and 'the foreign bee-* skill survives byte-identical (never deleted as fresh)' FAILED - apply reported applied and DELETED bee-newer. P1-2: 'decoy BEE_VERSION comment never resolves :: exit 0 status applied' (decoy 0.1.18 masked real 0.1.20, downgrade proceeded); multiple declarations, symlinked marker, and symlinked templates/ component all 'exit 0 status applied'. P1-3: dir->file apply crashed 'ENOTDIR: not a directory, lstat .../bee-doc/guide/deep/note.md'; file->dir apply crashed 'Path is a directory: rm returned EISDIR .../bee-doc/guide' - both directions broken mid-apply. P1-4: 'repo inside the skills root: apply refuses :: exit 0 status applied' and 'the live checkout survives untouched' FAILED - remove_skill erased the bee-local repo (.git included); target-in-repo direction also applied. Run 2 (BEE_CASE_FS_DIR=/mnt/c/Users/Public, case-insensitive drvfs): P1-5 red - plan contained {sync_skill bee-alpha} + {remove_skill bee-Alpha} for ONE physical dir; post-apply readInstalled('bee-Alpha/SKILL.md') was null (sync-then-delete destroyed the skill).",
  "verification_run": "node --check onboard_bee.mjs && node test_onboard_bee.mjs && node templates/tests/test_lib.mjs -> exit 0: suite PASS failures:0 (232 ok, 1 named platform skip for the case-alias case on case-sensitive /tmp); second full run with BEE_CASE_FS_DIR=/mnt/c/Users/Public -> PASS failures:0 skipped:0 (all 7 alias checks exercised for real); test_lib 124 passed, 0 failed",
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "10u (case-alias) skips with a named reason on case-sensitive filesystems as the cell prescribes; red+green were both captured for real via BEE_CASE_FS_DIR pointed at the case-insensitive /mnt/c mount on this WSL host"
  ]
}
